song.title: Hallelujah (Your Love Is Amazing)
song.lyrics:
[v1] 1) Your love is amazing,| steady and unchanging Your love is a mountain,| firm beneath my feet Your love is a mystery,| how you gently lift me When I am surrounded,| your love carries me [c] Chorus Hallelujah, hallelujah Hallelujah, your love makes me sing Hallelujah, hallelujah Hallelujah, your love makes me sing [v2] 2) Your love is surprising,| I can feel it rising All the joy that's growing| deep inside of me Every time I see you,| all your goodness shines through And I can feel this God song,| rising up in me
[E] 1) Your love is amazing, steady and unchanging Your love is a mountain, firm beneath my feet Your love is a mystery, how you gently lift me When I am surrounded, your love carries me Chorus Hallelujah, hallelujah Hallelujah, your love makes me sing Hallelujah, hallelujah Hallelujah, your love makes me sing 2) Your love is surprising, I can feel it rising All the joy that's growing deep inside of me Every time I see you, all your goodness shines through And I can feel this God song, rising up in me
